examples: Tis in the heath, but not furze.
Sadly, Mr Furze will not legally be allowed to use it on the road.
Tell her what Heathcliff is: an unreclaimed creature, without refinement, without cultivation: an arid wilderness of furze and whinstone.
Teresa Wood, 63, of Furze Hill, Bodmin, was found guilty of conspiracy to supply heroin last year.
